technical_replicate: The separated peptides were analyzed on-line by using a Q-Exactive Plus mass spectrometer... with triplicate injections.
experimental_design: We have shown above that a combination of high-resolution X-ray crystallographic structural information and mass spectrometry measurements... can resolve previously found ambiguities between the gene-derived protein sequences and the sequences found in the crystal structure.
factor_value: The crystal structure of phycocyanin (pr-PC) isolated from Phormidium rubidum
